# AltorLab Room Redesign

> AI-powered room redesign tool. Upload a photo of your room and get a photorealistic redesign in any style — Scandinavian, modern, minimalist, bohemian, and more. From $9 per design.

## Room Redesign Tool
- https://app.altorlab.org/: AI room redesign tool — upload photo, choose style, get redesign in seconds

## Design Styles
- https://app.altorlab.org/styles/modern: Modern room design ideas
- https://app.altorlab.org/styles/scandinavian: Scandinavian interior design
- https://app.altorlab.org/styles/minimalist: Minimalist room design
- https://app.altorlab.org/styles/bohemian: Bohemian room decor ideas
- https://app.altorlab.org/styles/industrial: Industrial style room makeover

## Use Cases
- https://app.altorlab.org/use-cases/real-estate-staging: AI room staging for real estate listings — $9 vs $800 traditional staging

## Blog
- /blog/ai-room-design-usa: AI room design for US homes
- /blog/best-room-redesign-apps: Best AI room redesign apps compared
- /blog/ai-vs-interior-designer: AI room redesign vs hiring an interior designer
